rulings.Case Title: IN RE: NEMAN BROTHERS AND ASSOCIATES, INC., A CALIFORNIA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Casue Re: Sale Of Real Property (Ccp 704.750;Ccp 704.770
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 31, 2022 line 1. ORDER TO SHOW CASUE RE: SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (CCP 704.750; CCP 704.770) is GRANTED as requested. No opposition filed. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: ONE GRANT PROPERTY OWNER LLC VS. 1AND8 INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 31, 2022 line 6. DEFENDANT 1AND8, INC.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is continued to October 21, 2022. The only defendant in this action is "1and8, Inc, a Delaware corporation." No later than September 23, 2022 the principal of the corporation that filed this motion shall file a declaration stating whether (1) the moving entity is the "1and8, Inc, a Delaware corporation;" or the moving entity is some other corporation, (e.g. "1and8, California corporation" (Garson Declaration 2:6-7); (2) the connection between the two corporations, if any; and (3) which corporation, if any, is the party to the Lease at issue in this action. No further argument is required, only the declaration as described above shall be filed. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.
